title: No-op reverse lookup probe
inspired_by: Minimal loop validation: apply an unused file and verify the focused gate rejects non-improvements.
risk: Should not change benchmark behavior; if it passes, the loop is likely too noise-sensitive.

title: No-op path quality probe
inspired_by: Minimal loop validation: exercise apply/revert and path-quality gating without touching query logic.
risk: Should not change benchmark behavior; if it passes, the loop is likely too noise-sensitive.
